title: Mockup v2: redeploy to Vercel after MMG/Gym restructure
description: After the four v2 beads land, deploy via 'vercel --prod --yes' and verify https://kfandra-track.vercel.app reflects the new structure. Note: Vercel is NOT wired to GitHub auto-deploy; manual step required.
acceptance_criteria: vercel --prod succeeds; live site shows 4-section MMG entry, equipment+weight gym, KFANDRA terminology.
close_reason: Deployed v2 via vercel --prod 2026-04-29; live site shows 4-section MMG, gym equipment+weight, no Coach references.

title: Mockup v2: gym entry with equipment + weight (10 kg steps)
description: Add equipment dropdown and weight input to gym entry. Equipment list (sheet col C row-pair): Lbb, Sbb, T-Bar, Dead-Lift, Resistance bands, Dumbbells, Z-bar, Weight plates, None / bodyweight. Weight is a stepper in 10 kg increments (20, 30, 40…). Hide weight when equipment is 'Resistance bands' or 'None / bodyweight'. Set/rep scheme picker uses sheet presets ('6 sets, 8, 4×6, 8' etc.) plus 'Custom…' free-text option.
acceptance_criteria: Add-exercise sheet has body part → equipment → weight (conditional) → set/rep scheme → notes; weight stepper increments of 10 kg; row card shows body part, equipment, weight, scheme; submit-to-KFANDRA flow unchanged.

title: Mockup v2: restructure MMG into 4 sections (Participation/Performance/Other/Narration)
description: Replace tap-calculator UX with structured form per coach + user feedback 29 Apr. Sections: (1) Participation — set-once form: confirmation order, arrival rank, 3 yes/no toggles (unpacking/packing weights/packing kit), confirmed-by-8am toggle. Both rank fields are dynamic (N×100 to 100), points computed at approval — app shows rank only. (2) Performance — list of per-game cards via Add Game bottom sheet. Game types: Football short, Rugby short, Fooba Big Goal, Fooba Rebound, 3-and-in, Other. Result: Won +1000 / Drew +100 / Lost +0. Stats steppers: Goals ×500, Tries ×500, Assists ×200, Pre-assists ×100, Saves ×500, Clearances ×500. (3) Other — ad-hoc list: description + free-form points. (4) Narration — optional textarea.
acceptance_criteria: Page structured into the 4 named sections; Participation locks after submit; multiple games can be added/edited/deleted; Other supports multiple ad-hoc rows; running total reflects all sections except dynamic rank points.
notes: MMG drill 100 deferred — neither user nor Jaidev recognize what drill the Coach meant. Will ask Coach.

title: Mockup v2: replace 'Coach' with 'KFANDRA' across UI
description: User-facing terminology change. Internal role names (RBAC) stay as 'coach'. Affected strings: 'Submit to Coach', 'Pending Coach approval', 'Coach approves', 'Coach edited', 'Coach note', 'awaiting Coach', 'Coach to confirm', 'Coach gets a notification', 'Notes for the Coach'.
acceptance_criteria: No 'Coach' visible in mockup UI; all submit/approval flows reference KFANDRA.

title: Mockup: deploy refreshed mockups to Vercel for team review
description: After all mockup beads land, redeploy https://kfandra-track.vercel.app with the new screens. Verify: 3-tab nav, no leaderboard/league/balance routes, login is phone+PIN, MMG calculator works, Gym entry works, My Submissions shows history. Share URL with Jaidev for Coach review.
acceptance_criteria: Vercel deploy succeeds; manual smoke check of all 7 routes (login, register, home, mmg-session, gym-session, my-submissions, pending-approval) passes on a phone viewport.
close_reason: Manually deployed via vercel --prod on 2026-04-29; GitHub auto-deploy not wired up

title: Send Coach the open questions list (4 items needing his confirmation)
description: Items the user wants Coach to confirm before locking V1 design: (1) App name — keep 'KFANDRA Track' or pick a new one? (2) MMG entry UX — confirm tap-to-add (each press adds points) vs quantity-field. (3) Game type pre-selector — pick game first, see right buttons (vs all on one screen). (4) 'Other' points — free-form 'Other +N' vs Coach-defined extra-buttons list. Format as a short doc/email Coach can reply to async.
acceptance_criteria: Doc or email draft prepared with the 4 questions framed simply for non-technical reader; sent or staged for Jaidev to forward.

title: Mockup: phone + 4-digit PIN login + self-registration
description: Replace current /mockups/login content with phone-number + 4-digit-PIN auth. Add a registration flow (phone + name + chosen PIN) that lands the user on a 'Pending Coach approval' state. Single role in V1 — every login is a normal player. SMS OTP is a V2 enhancement, leave a note. This is a mockup so no real auth — fake the flow with localStorage state.
acceptance_criteria: Login screen has phone-number field and 4-digit PIN; Register link leads to a self-registration form; after registration user sees a 'Pending coach approval' screen; mockup uses localStorage to fake auth state.

title: Mockup: My Submissions / history screen
description: New screen showing the player's own past submissions across MMG + Gym, with each submission's approval state (pending / approved / edited-by-coach / rejected) and the pre/post-edit values when Coach edited. No other players' data visible. Reset-to-zero affordance for a new session if the screen is reached after Submit.
acceptance_criteria: History list shows submission date, type (MMG/Gym), running total, status badge; tapping a row shows full detail including any Coach edits; player can start a fresh session from this screen.

title: Mockup: gym performance entry screen
description: New /mockups/gym-session screen modelled on Jaidev's GWW/GWtW routines sheet. Flow: pick body part (Shoulders / Biceps / Triceps / Chest / Thighs / Calves / Abs / Press Ups / Reverse Zor / Zor / Baithaks / Lunges / Full Burpees / Half Burpees / Sumo Walk) → log sets × reps (e.g. '6 sets, 8 reps × 4') with free-form Explanation/notes field → Submit-to-Coach. Same approval workflow as MMG. Catalog should be a structured list (placeholder data) with a note that Coach can add exercises in V1.1+.
acceptance_criteria: Body-part picker shows 15 options from the sheet; user can add multiple exercise rows in one session; each row captures sets/reps + notes; Submit triggers same Coach-approval state as MMG.

title: Mockup: calculator-style MMG entry screen
description: Replace current /mockups/mmg-session (tabbed pre-existing data view) with a tap-button calculator. Flow: (1) game-type pre-selector (Fooba Big Goal / Fooba Rebound Wall / Short Game / End-game Drill / 3-and-in) shows the right buttons, (2) tap buttons add to running total — repeated taps accumulate (e.g. Goal +500, MMG drill +100), (3) free-form 'Other +N' input for blip/random points, (4) order-of-arrival self-declared (1st/2nd/3rd…), (5) optional narration text box at end, (6) Submit-to-Coach button. After submit, auto-reset with New session option. Drafts persist locally (localStorage).
acceptance_criteria: User can pick game type and see only the relevant buttons; tap buttons add to a visible running total; Other field accepts free-form points; order-of-arrival selectable; narration optional; Submit clears local total to 0; partial state survives a page refresh.
notes: Items needing Coach confirmation: tap-to-add UX, game-first pre-selector, Other free-form vs preset list. Treat as drafts in mockup.

title: Mockup: rebuild Home as 2-tile launchpad (MMG + Gym)
description: Drop Rank #4 of 13 and any leaderboard hint. Home becomes a launchpad with two large tiles: MMG score entry, Gym performance. Add a 'My Submissions' link/section. Mobile-first.
acceptance_criteria: No leaderboard or rank text on home; two large tappable tiles route to /mockups/mmg-session and /mockups/gym-session; My Submissions link visible.

title: Mockups: delete retired screens and trim bottom nav to 3 tabs
description: Per Coach feedback 13 Apr: leaderboards/league/finance belong on the website, not the app. Delete /mockups/mmg-standings, /mockups/klc-league, /mockups/klc-balance. Update bottom nav in src/app/mockups/layout.tsx from 5 tabs (Home/Session/Rankings/League/Finance) to 3 tabs (Home/MMG/Gym).
acceptance_criteria: Three mockup directories removed; layout.tsx nav shows Home/MMG/Gym; no broken links remain on home page.

title: V1 scope pivot: calculator-style MMG entry app (coach feedback 13 Apr)
description: Coach feedback 13 Apr 2026: Remove leaderboards, league table, balance sheet, player values from V1. App is a calculator-style point entry tool for MMG submissions only. Players tap buttons (preset point values), optionally add narration, submit to coach for approval, reset to zero. KLCFESGR1 deferred to V2. See docs/feedback-review-2026-04-13.md.
close_reason: V1 mockup pivot complete; all child beads closed and deployed

title: Mockup v2: My Submissions reflects new MMG structure
description: Submission detail sheet shows the 4-section breakdown (Participation / Performance / Other / Narration) instead of a flat event list. Gym detail shows body part / equipment / weight / scheme per row. Status badges and KFANDRA-edit notes carry over.
acceptance_criteria: MMG submission detail sheet renders the 4 sections; gym detail shows equipment + weight; KFANDRA terminology used throughout.

title: Phase 5: Polish & Handover
description: PWA optimization, responsive polish, security audit, docs, final testing

title: Phase 4: Reporting & Export
description: Audit logs, CSV/PDF export, admin dashboard, Google Sheets export, aggregations

description: Session management, attendance/packing/game entry, standings, alerts

title: Phase 3: KLCFESGR1 Mode
description: Season/club management, match entry, balance sheets, league table, loans

description: Login/signup, role-based auth, user profiles, protected routes

title: Bead 4: Database schema & migrations
description: Create all tables, RLS policies, seed data for players and clubs

description: GitHub Actions (lint, test, build), Sentry, Vercel deployment

description: Create Next.js app with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, PWA config

title: Bead 1: Initialize repo, superpowers, beads
description: Set up git repo, install superpowers skills, configure beads tracker

title: Phase 0: Infrastructure Setup
description: Initialize repo, scaffold Next.js, set up Supabase, DB schema, CI/CD

value: Attendance/order-of-arrival sheet structure (April 2026 sheet, screenshot): Per-session block has 20 player slots (Male, max 12 currently; Female, max 1). Each cell = '<arrival-rank> <time>' + name (e.g. '1 0000 Ahchin', '4 523 Goodman'). Sidebar widgets: Current Members, Confirmed so far, Dropped today, In advance, AVA THIS MORN, Tentative, Unconfirmed, Ava post 730 / till 8 / Tue,Thu / Sat. New sheet per month. Source: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1K4P24YfwZKNKllv5mKaakK65XA2G6e7V6swlzpz867A

Gym catalog sheet (screenshot): body-part picker = Shoulders, Biceps, Triceps, Chest, Thighs, Calves, Abs, Press Ups, Reverse Zor, Zor, Baithaks, Lunges, Full Burpees, Half Burpees, Sumo Walk, None. Each row logs: body part, set count (e.g. '6 sets, 8 reps × 4'), and a free-form Explanation/notes field. Reps fields visible per cell. Source: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1tC9XuPh3lual1WdfbXPWTy5Xb-L50kTUwohRzcgwlgI

V1 mockup decisions (2026-04-29): App name TBD by Coach. Auth = phone + 4-digit PIN with self-registration → Coach approval. MMG entry = tap-to-add calculator (Goal +500 per tap). Game type pre-selector (pick game first → see right buttons). Order-of-arrival self-declared, Coach approves. Other points = free-form. Narration optional, end of form. Point values editable by Coach (admin screen). In-app approval only. Edit window: practice ends 8am → submit by 12 noon → Coach approves by 4pm. Auto-reset on Submit (with 'New session' option). Persist drafts locally. Gym catalog from Jaidev's GWW/GWtW sheet (https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1tC9XuPh3lual1WdfbXPWTy5Xb-L50kTUwohRzcgwlgI). Gym entry uses same submit→Coach workflow. Coach can edit catalog. Players see own history + edits/approvals. V1 syncs to designated Google Sheet. Items needing Coach confirmation: app name, tap-to-add UX, game-first pre-selector, free-form 'Other' points.

Vercel deploy is NOT wired to GitHub for kfandra-track. Pushing to main does NOT auto-deploy. Must run 'vercel --prod --yes' from repo root after every push to update https://kfandra-track.vercel.app. Vercel CLI uses jaidevk-6271 account. Git remote is https://github.com/jaidevk/kfandra-track.git and pushing requires the 'jaidevk' gh account (not 'jk-ootb'); switch with 'gh auth switch -u jaidevk' before pushing.
